title: bupleurum canaliculatum
intro: Bupleurum canaliculatum, also known as Chinese Thorowax or Bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum canaliculatum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Bupleurum canaliculatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
